productDisplayName: Fossil Men White Dial Chronograph Watch FS4640
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: White dial with copper handsStrap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Three chronograph time displays, date aperture on the dial, branding displayed on the dial and screw to reset time Waterproof to 5 ATM, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 2 yearsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
